field.name: help
field.p: Define keywords for adverse media screening with associated risk levels.

field.name: help
field.p: Adverse media alerts will appear here when new potential risks are detected.

field.name: help
field.p: Customer are grouped by sector or industries

field.name: help
field.p: Tiers categorize customers based on their levels.

field.name: help
field.p: Regions categorize customers based on geographical areas.

field.name: help
field.p: Risk Categories help group risks for better management.

field.name: help
field.p: The Risk Universe encompasses all potential risks faced by the organization.

field.name: help
field.p: Risk Subjects represent specific topics or areas related to risk within a universe.

field.name: help
field.p: Risk Types represent different categories or kinds of risks managed within the system.

field.name: help
field.p: Customers flagged on the PEP list will appear here.

field.name: help
field.p: Configure SQL queries to generate dynamic charts for your Odoo data.

field.name: help
field.p: Customer Enhanced Due Diligence is conducted here

field.name: help
field.p: Click to add a new Risk Score.

field.name: help
field.p: Create your first OpenSanctions import job
Select a PEP source and job type to get started. The system will automatically configure the job based on the selected source.

record.field: user = env.user compliance_groups = [ 'compliance_management.group_compliance_chief_compliance_officer', 'compliance_management.group_compliance_compliance_officer', 'compliance_management.group_compliance_transaction_monitoring_team', ] domain = [ ('internal_category', '=', 'customer'), ('origin', 'in', ['demo', 'test', 'prod']), ('risk_level', '=', 'high'), ] if not any(user.has_group(group) for group in compliance_groups): domain.insert(0, ('branch_id.id', 'in', [branch.id for branch in user.branches_id])) action = { 'name': 'High-Risk Customers', 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'res_model': 'res.partner', 'view_mode': 'tree,form', 'domain': domain, 'context': {'search_default_group_branch': 1}, }

user = env.user compliance_groups = [ 'compliance_management.group_compliance_chief_compliance_officer', 'compliance_management.group_compliance_compliance_officer', 'compliance_management.group_compliance_transaction_monitoring_team', ] domain = [ ('internal_category', '=', 'customer'), ('origin', 'in', ['demo', 'test', 'prod']), ('bvn', '=', False), ] if not any(user.has_group(group) for group in compliance_groups): domain.insert(0, ('branch_id.id', 'in', [branch.id for branch in user.branches_id])) action = { 'name': 'Customers /wo BVN', 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'res_model': 'res.partner', 'view_mode': 'tree,form', 'domain': domain, 'context': {'search_default_group_branch': 1}, }

field.name: help
field.p: Define keywords for adverse media screening with associated risk levels.

field.name: help
field.p: Run customer screening to detect potential PEP matches.

field.name: help
field.p: Run customer screening to detect potential watchlist matches.

field.name: help
field.p: Run customer screening to detect potential sanction list matches.

field.name: help
field.p: Run customer screening to detect potential global PEP matches.

field.name: help
field.p: Run customer screening to detect potential blacklist matches.

field.name: help
field.p: Run customer screening to detect potential FEP list matches.

field.name: help
field.p: Define alert officers for Sanction Screening.

field.name: help
field.p: All screening results have been reviewed.

field.name: help
field.p: Conduct EDD for a corporate customer
Corporate customer enhanced due diligence is conducted here
